zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Bassingbourne於1334年出生在英國坎布利其爾特朗平頓時，她的父親John de Bassingbourne27歲，母親Joan le Frauncis22歲。她於1354年與Sir Thomas de Mauduit結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾瓦明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Bassingbourne于1334年出生在英国坎布利其爾特朗平頓时，她的父亲John de Bassingbourne27岁，母亲Joan le Frauncis22岁。她于1354年与Sir Thomas de Mauduit结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾瓦明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Bassingbourne was born in 1334, in Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, John de Bassingbourne, was 27 and her mother, Joan le Frauncis, was 22. She married Sir Thomas de Mauduit in 1354. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1387, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Warminster, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Bassingbourne est née en 1334, à Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Bassingbourne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan le Frauncis, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Mauduit en 1354. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1387, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Warminster, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Bassingbourne 1334 in Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Bassingbourne 27 und ihre Mutter Joan le Frauncis 22. Sie hat 1354 Sir Thomas de Mauduit geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1387 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Warminster, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Bassingbourne è nata il nel 1334 nel Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, John de Bassingbourne, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan le Frauncis, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Mauduit nel 1354. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1387, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Warminster, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Bassingbourneが1334年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアトルンパントンで生まれた時，父John de Bassingbourneは27歳，母Joan le Frauncisは22歳であった。1354年にSir Thomas de Mauduitと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアワーミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Bassingbourne(이)가 1334년 영국 캄브리지실르 트럼핀그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Bassingbourne(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan le Frauncis(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1354년 Sir Thomas de Mauduit(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 워민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Bassingbourne nasceu em 1334, em Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bassingbourne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan le Frauncis, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Mauduit em 1354. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1387, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Bassingbourne родилась в 1334 г. в местности трумпингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Bassingbourne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan le Frauncis, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Mauduit в 1354 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1387 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности варминстир, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan Bassingbourne nació en 1334, en Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Bassingbourne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan le Frauncis, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas de Mauduit en 1354. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1387, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
